questions.q: In which industry did Madhuri Dixit become the dominant female star of the late 1980s and 1990s?
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit became the leading female star of Hindi (Bollywood) cinema in the late 1980s and 1990s.

questions.q: Which 1988 film, featuring the song 'Ek Do Teen', made Madhuri Dixit a star?
questions.explanation: Tezaab (1988), with the hit song 'Ek Do Teen', established Madhuri Dixit as a major star.

questions.q: Which hit song from the film Tezaab is closely associated with Madhuri Dixit's rise to fame?
questions.explanation: 'Ek Do Teen' from Tezaab (1988) was the breakout song that propelled Madhuri Dixit to stardom.

questions.q: In which year was Madhuri Dixit born?
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit was born on 15 May 1967 in Bombay (Mumbai).

questions.q: Which 1994 blockbuster starring Madhuri Dixit and Salman Khan cemented her stardom?
questions.explanation: Hum Aapke Hain Koun..! (1994), co-starring Salman Khan, was a massive blockbuster that cemented her stardom.

questions.q: For which art form, beyond acting, is Madhuri Dixit especially celebrated in Hindi cinema?
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit's dancing made her a defining performer of her era.

questions.q: The song 'Dhak Dhak Karne Laga', strongly linked with Madhuri Dixit, is from which 1992 film?
questions.explanation: 'Dhak Dhak Karne Laga' is from the 1992 film Beta, starring Madhuri Dixit and Anil Kapoor.

questions.q: In Hum Aapke Hain Koun..!, Madhuri Dixit played a character named what?
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit played Nisha in Hum Aapke Hain Koun..! (1994).

questions.q: Which acting award did Madhuri Dixit win multiple times during her career in Hindi cinema?
options: National Film Award for Best Actress
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit won the Filmfare Award for Best Actress multiple times across her career.

questions.q: The song 'Choli Ke Peeche Kya Hai', picturised on Madhuri Dixit, is from which 1993 film?
questions.explanation: 'Choli Ke Peeche Kya Hai' is from the 1993 film Khalnayak, directed by Subhash Ghai.

questions.q: Which 1990 film paired Madhuri Dixit with Aamir Khan in a romantic hit directed by Indra Kumar?
questions.explanation: Dil (1990), directed by Indra Kumar, paired Madhuri Dixit with Aamir Khan and was a major success.

questions.q: In the 1993 film Khalnayak, alongside Madhuri Dixit and Jackie Shroff, who played the antagonist Ballu?
questions.explanation: Sanjay Dutt played the antagonist Ballu in Khalnayak (1993), alongside Madhuri Dixit and Jackie Shroff.

questions.q: Hum Aapke Hain Koun..!, starring Madhuri Dixit, was directed by which filmmaker?
questions.explanation: Hum Aapke Hain Koun..! (1994) was directed by Sooraj Barjatya of Rajshri Productions.

questions.q: In which 1997 Yash Chopra film did Madhuri Dixit star opposite Shah Rukh Khan in a love triangle?
questions.explanation: Dil To Pagal Hai (1997), directed by Yash Chopra, starred Madhuri Dixit opposite Shah Rukh Khan.

questions.q: Which 2002 film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali featured Madhuri Dixit as the courtesan Chandramukhi?
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit played the courtesan Chandramukhi in Sanjay Leela Bhansali's Devdas (2002).

questions.q: Which choreographer was a key collaborator behind many of Madhuri Dixit's iconic dance numbers, including 'Ek Do Teen'?
questions.explanation: Choreographer Saroj Khan designed many of Madhuri Dixit's famous dances, including 'Ek Do Teen'.

questions.q: In the 1994 film Anjaam, Madhuri Dixit starred opposite which actor playing an obsessive stalker?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan played the obsessive antagonist in Anjaam (1994), opposite Madhuri Dixit.

questions.q: Which surname did Madhuri Dixit add to her name after her 1999 marriage?
questions.explanation: After marrying Dr. Sriram Nene in 1999, Madhuri Dixit took his surname and became Madhuri Dixit Nene.

questions.q: Whom did Madhuri Dixit marry in 1999, leading her to take a break from films?
options: A film producer named Boney Kapoor
A cardiovascular surgeon named Sriram Nene
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit married cardiovascular surgeon Dr. Sriram Nene in 1999 and moved to the United States.

questions.q: Which 1991 musical romance paired Madhuri Dixit with Sanjay Dutt and Salman Khan in a love triangle?
questions.explanation: Saajan (1991) featured Madhuri Dixit in a love triangle with Sanjay Dutt and Salman Khan and was a major musical hit.

questions.q: Which 2007 Yash Raj Films dance drama marked Madhuri Dixit's acting comeback after her marriage break?
questions.explanation: Aaja Nachle (2007), produced by Yash Raj Films and directed by Anil Mehta, marked Madhuri Dixit's return to acting after her five-year break.

questions.q: The song 'Didi Tera Devar Deewana', a wedding favourite picturised on Madhuri Dixit, is from which film?
questions.explanation: 'Didi Tera Devar Deewana' is from Hum Aapke Hain Koun..! (1994), picturised on Madhuri Dixit.

questions.q: What was the title of Madhuri Dixit's debut film, released in 1984?
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit made her acting debut in Abodh (1984).

questions.q: Which 1989 film paired Madhuri Dixit with Anil Kapoor and Jackie Shroff in a Subhash Ghai directorial that was a major hit?
questions.explanation: Ram Lakhan (1989), directed by Subhash Ghai, starred Madhuri Dixit with Anil Kapoor and Jackie Shroff.

questions.q: In Sanjay Leela Bhansali's Devdas (2002), which actress played Paro opposite Madhuri Dixit's Chandramukhi?
questions.explanation: Aishwarya Rai played Paro in Devdas (2002), alongside Madhuri Dixit's Chandramukhi.

questions.q: For her role in which 1997 Prakash Jha film did Madhuri Dixit play a rural woman fighting injustice?
questions.explanation: In Mrityudand (1997), directed by Prakash Jha, Madhuri Dixit played a rural woman challenging oppression.

questions.q: Which national civilian honour was conferred on Madhuri Dixit by the Government of India in 2008?
questions.explanation: Madhuri Dixit was awarded the Padma Shri by the Government of India in 2008.

questions.q: In the 2014 film Dedh Ishqiya, Madhuri Dixit starred opposite which veteran actor playing a poetry-loving Begum?
questions.explanation: In Dedh Ishqiya (2014), Madhuri Dixit played Begum Para opposite Naseeruddin Shah.

questions.q: Madhuri Dixit made her Marathi-language film debut as an actress with which 2018 film?
questions.explanation: Bucket List (2018) marked Madhuri Dixit's Marathi-language film debut as an actress.

questions.q: Which 2022 Netflix series marked Madhuri Dixit's debut as the lead in a streaming web series?
questions.explanation: The Fame Game (2022) was Madhuri Dixit's debut lead role in a Netflix web series.
